positive: A minimalistic and visually striking abstract celestial map art featuring constellations rendered as elegant, flowing line work against a deep indigo, nebula-infused midnight blue background. The main subject is a stylized, glowing crescent moon positioned centrally, accompanied by geometric star formations and ethereal, vaporwave-inspired cosmic dust streaks. The style should be a combination of Art Deco and modern line art, utilizing strong black lines and pops of glowing cyan, soft lavender, and metallic gold highlights. Composition must be highly symmetrical and clean, suitable for direct transfer onto fabric. Focus on perfect silhouettes and high contrast. No photorealism, pure graphic design.
negative: photorealistic, blur, grainy, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, dirty, cluttered, messy, noisy, jpeg artifacts
